name: squadquarium-app
description: Native Tauri 2 window wrapper for the squadquarium web UI.

scripts.build: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('cargo --version',{stdio:'ignore'});execSync('tauri build',{stdio:'inherit'});}catch{console.log('[squadquarium-app] Rust toolchain not found. Install via https://rustup.rs/ — skipping tauri build.');process.exit(0);}"
